name: debugger
description: Debugging specialist for errors, test failures, and unexpected
capabilities: Analyze error messages and stack traces to identify failure points
Guide users through systematic debugging workflows and checklists
Provide step-by-step root cause analysis for code issues
Suggest minimal code fixes with evidence-based reasoning
Recommend testing approaches to verify solutions
Offer prevention strategies to avoid similar issues
author: sickn33
securitySummary: This is a prompt-only skill containing only debugging instructions and best practices. No executable code was detected. The static analysis scanned 0 files and found 0 security issues. The skill provides guidance on debugging workflows without any access to system resources, network, or filesystem operations.
valueStatement: When developers encounter mysterious errors or unexpected behavior, they struggle to identify the root cause. The debugger skill provides a systematic approach to analyze errors, trace issues to their source, and implement verified fixes.
userTitle: Debug Code Errors and Find Root Causes
limitations: Cannot execute code or run tests directly - only provides guidance
Cannot access project files without explicit user request
Cannot debug runtime issues in real-time execution environments
Limited to textual analysis of provided error information

useCases.title: Fix Unexpected Test Failures
useCases.description: When automated tests fail with cryptic error messages, use this skill to analyze the failure, trace the root cause, and implement a fix.

useCases.title: Debug Production Errors
useCases.description: When production errors occur, use this skill to systematically analyze logs, identify the failing component, and determine the appropriate fix.

useCases.targetUser: Junior developers and coding bootcamp students
useCases.title: Learn Debugging Best Practices
useCases.description: New developers can use this skill to learn systematic debugging approaches, including how to form hypotheses, add debug logging, and verify solutions.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Error Analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me debug this error: [paste error message and stack trace here]. What is the likely root cause and how should I fix it?
promptTemplates.scenario: Quick analysis of a single error or exception

promptTemplates.title: Debugging Session
promptTemplates.prompt: I am encountering [describe the unexpected behavior]. The error occurs when [describe reproduction steps]. Help me identify the root cause and fix it.
promptTemplates.scenario: Systematic debugging of a reproducible issue

promptTemplates.title: Test Failure Investigation
promptTemplates.prompt: My tests are failing with this output: [paste test failure]. Guide me through debugging this step by step and recommend a fix.

promptTemplates.title: Preventive Debugging
promptTemplates.prompt: I recently fixed a bug where [describe the bug and fix]. What best practices should I follow to prevent similar issues? What testing approach should I use?
promptTemplates.scenario: Learning from recent bugs to prevent recurrence

bestPractices: Always capture the complete error message and stack trace before attempting fixes
Reproduce the issue with minimal steps to isolate the root cause
Verify fixes with tests before considering the issue resolved
antiPatterns: Making changes without understanding the root cause - this leads to symptom treatment rather than actual fixes
Ignoring error messages and stack traces - they contain valuable diagnostic information
Skipping verification steps - always test that your fix actually resolves the issue

faq.question: What information should I provide when asking for debugging help?
faq.answer: Provide the error message, stack trace, relevant code snippets, and steps to reproduce the issue. The more context you give, the better the guidance.

faq.question: Can this skill fix my code automatically?
faq.answer: No. This skill provides guidance, analysis, and recommendations. You must implement the fixes yourself based on the guidance provided.

faq.question: What types of errors can this skill help with?
faq.answer: This skill helps with any code-related errors including runtime exceptions, type errors, logic errors, test failures, and unexpected behavior in any programming language.

faq.question: How does this skill approach debugging?
faq.answer: It uses a systematic approach: capture error details, identify reproduction steps, isolate the failure location, implement a minimal fix, and verify the solution works.

faq.question: Can this skill help with debugging production issues?
faq.answer: Yes, but you need to provide the error logs and relevant code. The skill cannot access your production systems directly.

faq.question: Does this skill work with all programming languages?
faq.answer: Yes. The debugging principles are language-agnostic. The skill can analyze errors and provide guidance for any programming language.
